broken_window.title: The Broken Window
brief: Someone lobbed a kickball through Room 12's window at recess.
Three kids were near the blacktop.
clues: The culprit had grass stains on BOTH knees.
Mia was inside all recess getting extra help.
Diego wore shorts — no knees to stain.

suspects.name: Mia
suspects.line: I was in tutoring — ask Mr. Lewis!

suspects.name: Diego
suspects.line: Shorts. No stained knees. I'm clean.

suspects.name: Avery
suspects.line: ...I just found the ball. That's all.

broken_window.success: Nice work, Detective. Avery's got a date with detention.
broken_window.fail: That kid's got an alibi. Read the clues again.
